title: agrostis alba var. vulgaris
intro: Agrostis alba var. vulgaris, also known as common bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of common bent grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating various ailments. Common bent grass can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
